creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Mar 23 17:59:12 2013
New Revision: 315058
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315058

Log:
  - Update to 0.79.3
  
  PR:		177271
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/cad/leocad/Makefile
  head/cad/leocad/distinfo
  head/cad/leocad/pkg-plist

Modified: head/cad/leocad/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/cad/leocad/Makefile	Sat Mar 23 17:58:06 2013	(r315057)
+++ head/cad/leocad/Makefile	Sat Mar 23 17:59:12 2013	(r315058)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	leocad
-PORTVERSION=	0.79.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.79.3
 CATEGORIES=	cad
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 DISTFILES=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-src.tgz ${LEOCAD_PIECES}
@@ -12,9 +12,9 @@ EXTRACT_ONLY=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	CAD modeling with LEGO-like bricks
 
-EXTRACT_DEPENDS=	${UNZIP_CMD}:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip
-LIB_DEPENDS=		jpeg:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
-			png15:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png
+EXTRACT_DEPENDS=${UNZIP_CMD}:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip
+LIB_DEPENDS=	jpeg:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
+		png15:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ USE_GL=		gl
 USE_GNOME=	gtk20
 USE_PKGCONFIG=	build
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
-INSTALL_ICONS=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 MAN1=		leocad.1
@@ -46,8 +46,10 @@ post-patch:
 		's|+= -g|+=| ; \
 		 s|@$$(CXX)|$$(CXX)| ; \
 		 s|@install -c -m 0755|$${BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM}| ; \
-		 s|@install -c -m 0644|$${BSD_INSTALL_MAN}| ; \
+		 s|@install -c -m 0644|$${BSD_INSTALL_DATA}| ; \
 		 s|share/man|man|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|-ldl||' ${WRKSRC}/common/module.mk
 
 do-configure:
 	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} PREFIX="${PREFIX}" ${GMAKE} config)

Modified: head/cad/leocad/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/cad/leocad/distinfo	Sat Mar 23 17:58:06 2013	(r315057)
+++ head/cad/leocad/distinfo	Sat Mar 23 17:59:12 2013	(r315058)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-SHA256 (leocad/leocad-0.79.2-src.tgz) = d2b0a515ce8302cd9234450773a339e330718463edf52d721e20edf6ccfa74e3
-SIZE (leocad/leocad-0.79.2-src.tgz) = 2115720
+SHA256 (leocad/leocad-0.79.3-src.tgz) = 588abe0b9415e550cb5087af131fd048228ea9b8e79e8ef831f104e3e5faf703
+SIZE (leocad/leocad-0.79.3-src.tgz) = 2124587
 SHA256 (leocad/pieces-7114.zip) = 16506da21d139769524d140ce47bfce57bc5415f541fbd6f66a67025c1f535ab
 SIZE (leocad/pieces-7114.zip) = 20546651

Modified: head/cad/leocad/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/cad/leocad/pkg-plist	Sat Mar 23 17:58:06 2013	(r315057)
+++ head/cad/leocad/pkg-plist	Sat Mar 23 17:59:12 2013	(r315058)
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 bin/leocad
 share/applications/leocad.desktop
 share/icons/hicolor/scalable/mimetypes/application-vnd.leocad.svg
-share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache
 %%DATADIR%%/icon.png
 %%DATADIR%%/library.bin
 share/mime/packages/leocad-mime.xml
